scenarios.docBefore:
# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers
scenarios.docAfter:
# Project Overview
## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

## Summary
This project outlines the key aspects and objectives for the evaluation test.

# Product Roadmap

## Q1 Goals



## Q2 Goals
scenarios.docAfter:
# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals
* Improve API response time by 20%.
* Optimize database queries for faster data retrieval.
* Reduce latency in the main user workflow by 15%.
## Q2 Goals
* Implement real-time collaboration feature.
* Introduce dark mode theme option.
* Develop and launch the new reporting module.
